briefdescription.para: Number of offchip revocation ID eFuses.
PPK Hash length in words for Versal and VersalNet.
PPK hash length in bits for Versal and VersalNet.
CRC value for all zero key.
This file contains the xilnvm Versal_Net API IDs.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 kal 01/05/22 Initial release 3.2 ng 06/30/23 Added support for system device tree flow yog 09/13/23 Fixed review comments 3.3 vss 02/23/24 Added IPI support for eFuse read and write ng 11/22/2023 Fixed doxygen grouping
